title: lepidium coronopifolium
intro: Lepidium coronopifolium, also known as cressleaf groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, thanks to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lepidium coronopifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Lepidium coronopifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are used in traditional herbal medicine.
